title: BUG

---

## **Describe the Bug**
> A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## **To Reproduce**
> Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. My environment setup is... (e.g., a fresh build directory)
2. I run the code...
3. I execute...
4. See error...

```cpp
// Please provide a minimal code snippet that reproduces the problem here.
```

## **Expected Behavior**
> A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## **Actual Behavior & Logs**
> What actually happened? Please provide full error messages, build logs, or crash stack traces.

## **Environment**
> Please provide the following key information, which is crucial for diagnosing C++ library issues.

- OS: [e.g. iOS]
- Compiler & Version: [e.g. GCC 13.2, Clang 17.0, MSVC 19.38 (VS 2022 17.8)]
- CMake Version: [e.g. 3.28.3]
- Library Version/Commit Hash: [e.g. v1.2.0 / `a1b2c3d`]
- Build Configuration: [e.g. Release with default flags / `-DTHREAD_POOL_BUILD_TESTS=ON`]

## **Additional Context**
> If applicable, please add additional context about the issue here, such as workarounds you've tried, links to related issues, etc.

## **Checklist**
- [ ] I have read the documentation and confirmed this is not the expected behavior.
- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have provided a minimal code snippet that reproduces the issue.
- [ ] I have completed all fields in the **Environment** section.
